summary: Verified that the concrete implementation of verbose guidance gating was already completed by a1 in Task 508. All acceptance criteria satisfied: guidance is gated behind --verbose for task roster, task report, task recommend, and task finish; task close and task review are already terse on success; focused tests prove default vs verbose behavior; JSON output remains stable; contract docs updated. No additional code changes required.

verification.command: pnpm --filter @narada2/cli exec vitest run test/commands/task-roster.test.ts test/commands/task-report.test.ts test/commands/task-recommend.test.ts
